title: Buttery Dutch Kid-Friendly Soffritto Dutch Soffritto Hash
description: A dense and delicious Dutch dish perfect for kids, made with soffritto base, orange juice, and a hint of butter.
instructions: In a molcajete, heat 2 tablespoons of melted butter over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the shredded cabbage, grated carrots, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the soffritto base, orange juice, salt, pepper, and saffron, mix well.
Add the chopped fresh parsley and mix well.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs.
Add the beaten eggs and mix well, until a pancake batter forms.
Add the all-purpose flour and mix well, until a dough forms.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Divide the dough into small portions and shape into small balls.
Roll each ball into a flat disc and add to the pan, cooking until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Repeat with the remaining dough, adding more butter as needed.
Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
